overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic waterfront at dawn. The scene transitions from a neon-lit night skyline to a golden sunrise as the character moves from an open promenade into a covered market area beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with neon skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers covered in bright neon signage and holographic displays
large tower structure with rotating holographic advertisements
metal safety railing along the waterfront edge
stacked shipping containers and crates with glowing blue accent lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark futuristic waterfront at night, with the camera moving forward along a promenade. Towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements dominate the skyline, reflecting off the water. The scene is devoid of pedestrians, creating a serene yet cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path at sunrise with industrial skyline

events.description: sun rises over the horizon creating a bright golden glare on the water and shifting from night to dawn

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path as dawn breaks, with the sun rising ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the adjacent road parallel to the waterfront

entered.detail: bright sun low on the horizon creating lens flare and golden reflections on the water
large elevated highway structure spanning across the distant view
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
cluster of industrial buildings with smokestacks visible against the sunrise

segments.scene_description: As the sun rises, the scene transitions from neon-lit night to golden dawn. The camera continues along the waterfront path with the bright sun creating a glare on the water ahead. An elevated highway becomes visible in the distance, and a futuristic vehicle passes on the adjacent road. The neon signs of the previous skyline fade from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront sidewalk with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved waterfront sidewalk, approaching and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person wearing a yellow plaid shirt and red beanie walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement showing a boxer with Japanese text
tall industrial cooling towers and smokestacks in the background

segments.scene_description: The path curves along the water's edge during golden hour, with the elevated highway now closer ahead. A large holographic boxing advertisement is visible on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt as they walk along the railing, with industrial towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market area beneath elevated highway with shops and lanterns

events.description: entering the semi-covered area beneath the elevated highway into a market zone with hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered market area beneath the overpass, passing vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near a market stall under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and ceiling of the elevated highway now directly overhead
small vendor stalls and shops set up under the overpass
traditional red paper lanterns hanging in rows beneath the overpass
bright neon signs for various shops and restaurants
exposed muddy shoreline and rocks along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the massive concrete overpass into a semi-covered market area. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and neon shop signs illuminate the left side where vendors have set up stalls. The muddy riverbank is visible on the right, and the space feels more enclosed and bustling with pedestrian activity compared to the open waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront that transforms from a neon-lit nocturnal skyline into a bustling, golden-hued market beneath a concrete overpass. It begins by gliding along a serene promenade dominated by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements reflecting off the dark water. As the sun rises, the vibrant neon signs fade and the lighting shifts to a brilliant golden dawn, creating a glare on the water as an elevated highway and a passing futuristic vehicle emerge in the distance. The camera then curves along the water's edge past a large holographic boxing ad and a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt before turning toward industrial towers on the horizon. Finally, the scene shifts from the open waterfront into the enclosed space beneath the massive overpass, where red paper lanterns and neon shop signs illuminate a crowded market area beside a muddy riverbank.
